_comment: Config for the AWIN CBD feed (CBD Green Labs). Differences from awin_default: sku comes from aw_product_id (merchant_product_id is not mapped), the image comes from merchant_image_url only (no aw_image_url fallback — mixing the two sources gives inconsistent imagery), and brand comes from the merchant_name COLUMN (brand_name is empty on 5,119 of 5,160 feed rows), so the extract_fields step is OFF — the die-cast title-regex extraction for brand/scale/year has no CBD equivalent and would overwrite the column-mapped brand with an empty string. fix_encoding stays on: this feed ships UTF-8 mojibake (e.g. â€“ for an en-dash). product-type is detected from the TITLE at import time via the afpi_product_type_rules filter in the child theme ([CBD-09]).

seo.opening_template: Discover the {title}, a third-party lab-tested CBD product from a trusted brand.
seo.closing_template: Check current pricing and availability for the {title} at the retailer.
